text:
ちょうど白ノ領域へ向かう所でしたの？
それならご一緒できて何よりですわ。

まあその、色々ありまして……
共闘の特訓みたいなものですわ。

共闘するなら、やはり貴方様が
一番いいですわ！

あの方のように、特訓と称した
無茶はなさらないでしょう

Were you just heading to the Daybreak
Province? Need a partner?
Don't mind if I do.

I mean, with everything going on, it'll be like
training for team battles.

Hey, if I'm going to pair up with anyone, it
has to be you!

You won't do something crazy, like claiming
it's in the name of INTENSIVE TRAINING like a
CERTAIN SOMEONE does, right? Right.
